title: Furniture Pads For Wooden Floors Floor Protector Felt Feet Chair Legs Anti Skid Rubber Protectors Sofa Dining Table Moving Sliders Self Adhesive Non Slip Tool Diy Home Use (Pack Of 56)
features: Furniture Pads Have High Quality Anti Skid Rubber Material And Strong Adhesive Protection Pads Are Safe Durable Comfortable And Long Lasting Felt Pads Are Designed For Furniture And Floor Protection Felt Anti Scratch Pads Make Furniture Easier To Move These Pads Are Great For Use Around The Home Or Workplace This Package Comes In Assorted Sizes And Shapes To Fit Most Surfaces

Self Adhesive Pads Are Used To Stick To The Bottom Of Furniture Which Helps To Protect Your Floor Or Furniture From Scratches And Scrapes When Cleaning It Also Reduces Friction And Noise When Moving Furniture Felt Pads Are Convenient To Apply Simply Peel Off The Backing Paper And Stick On A Clean Dry Surface Felt Pads Allows You To Slide Easily Without Scratching Or Marking Your Floors

Floor Protector Pads Are Suitable For All Type Of Furniture Feet Like Dressers Cabinets Bed Couch Cupboards Drawers Tables Sideboards Desks Chairs Sofa And Wherever You Need Floor Protection They Help Prevent The Legs Of Furniture From Scratching And Damaging These Pads Are Also Used To Protect Glass And Delicate Surfaces From Scratches

Furniture Pads Provides Smooth Protection And Protects Wood Laminate Carpet Ceramic Linoleum Tile Hardwood And Other Flooring These Protectors Are Also Suitable For Metal Tv Lamps Large Ornaments And Electrical Equipment Foam Pads Allow Items To Be Placed Safely And Softly Sticky Pads Are Ideal For Home Office School Cafe Restaurant And So On

Furniture Pads Have Great Quality And Excellent Value For Money You Purchase This Product For Multi Purpose Use This Package Provides You 56 Piece Furniture Pads You Receive 8 Larger Squares 24 Small Squares And 24 Small Circles
description: Product Description Please clean up the furniture leg surface before sticking felt pads for the best effect, can cut to the size of chair legs. The Premium Felt Pads are made from great quality felt, so they are durable and allow you to move furniture easily and quietly! Anti Scratch Felt pad protectors for Chair Legs and Feet, Protect Hardwood Tile Wood Floors, and laminate Flooring.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always ensure furniture is clean and dry before applying the pads. Be cautious when moving furniture to prevent slips. Do not use on uneven or unstable surfaces. Avoid using on delicate surfaces without proper protection.
